name: Kitz
description: Simple storefront and auto-follow-up platform for small businesses that sell through WhatsApp. Helps them get paid faster and stop losing customers.
target_users: Anyone selling through WhatsApp or social media

storefronts.description: Create shareable payment links and product pages in seconds. Share via WhatsApp. Customers view, order, and pay.

payments.description: Accept payments through Panama's most popular methods.

orders.description: Track every order from creation to delivery. Know who paid, who didn't, and what needs fulfillment.

auto_follow_ups.description: Never lose a customer again. Automatic follow-up reminders for unpaid orders, inactive customers, and pending deliveries.

customers.description: Simple customer list that grows automatically from orders. See who buys, how much they spend, and when to follow up.

products.description: Product catalog for creating storefronts faster.

tech_stack.frontend: React + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS + Vite + shadcn/ui
tech_stack.backend: Lovable Cloud (database, auth, edge functions, storage)
